label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won stage 12 sprint after UAE Emirates burned their team chasing down the early break, emptying themselves before the finale.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates chased all day solo for no payoff, burning matches that left them vulnerable at finish with 26km remaining.
DSM pulled Haller from break preemptively recognizing UAE's chase made it doomed, showing sophisticated energy management.
Late four-rider counterattack at 20km exploited peloton fragmentation after UAE's hard chase dispersed riders across parcours.
BikeExchange seized front with Matthews/Trentin after doing zero chase work, parasiting off UAE's wasted effort.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: won day after losing in final 200m previous stage, showing exceptional mental resilience to execute again
rider_signals.HALLER Chad: neutral: DSM tactically withdrew him from break early, suggesting team prioritizes long-term energy conservation over speculative efforts
rider_signals.ODD Christian: neutral: Intermarche honored red jersey with chase support but didn't commit fully, leaving UAE isolated
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: caught in major crash from touch of wheels, though remained in front group suggesting limited damage
